title: Birds: Our Fine Feathered Colleagues
description: Regional Geographic dives into the everyday world of birds.
quote: Of course one thing mother blue jay can’t defend against is a set of steel tongs.
altHero: a blue jay in a nest
alt2: Troy holding up two badgers by the bird
alt3: Troy looking at the nest of eggs
alt4: Troy and a young boy in a lab looking at an incubator full of baby birds
